name: FeatureGrid
description: Responsive grid of feature cards with staggered entrance animations.

children.description: Feature card elements to render in the grid

stagger.description: Stagger delay between children. Accepts a token name or milliseconds.

gap.description: Tailwind gap class applied to the grid

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the outer section

slots.name: children
slots.description: Feature card elements. Each child is auto-wrapped in FadeUp with stagger delay.

layout.description: Responsive grid. 1 col on mobile, 2 on tablet, columns prop on desktop.

aiPromptHint: Use FeatureGrid for displaying feature cards, benefits, or service offerings in a responsive grid. Pass cards as children — each is auto-wrapped in FadeUp with stagger delay. Use columns prop (2/3/4) to control layout.

examples.title: Basic 3-column grid
examples.code:
Feature 1
Feature 2
Feature 3

examples.title: 2-column with custom stagger
examples.code:
<FeatureGrid columns={2} stagger="slow" gap="gap-8">
  <GlowCard>Analytics Dashboard</GlowCard>
  <GlowCard>Real-time Monitoring</GlowCard>
  <GlowCard>Custom Reports</GlowCard>
  <GlowCard>API Access</GlowCard>
</FeatureGrid>
